_meta.task: Task B' (redo) — DPCD version mapping via forward version scanning
_meta.methodology: Forward chronological scan: DP 1.2 baseline → eDP 1.2 → eDP 1.3 → eDP 1.4/1.4a/1.4b → DP 1.3 → DP 1.4/1.4a → DP 2.0 → eDP 1.5
primary_sources: Linux kernel patches: drm/dp: add DPCD definitions from eDP 1.4 (Jani Nikula)
Linux kernel patches: drm/panelreplay: Panel Replay capability DPCD register definitions
VESA eDP 1.3 press release (PSR introduction, Feb 2011)
VESA eDP 1.4 press release (ALPM, regional backlight, link rate table)
Intel i915 driver: intel_dp_aux_backlight.c, eDP HDR patches
AMD display driver: AUPI register definitions
_meta.author: Task B' agent (independent from Task A')

0x00000.name: DPCD_REV
0x00000.evidence: drm_dp.h baseline (DP 1.1a, included in DP 1.2). DP_DPCD_REV = 0x000.

0x00001.name: MAX_LINK_RATE
0x00001.evidence: drm_dp.h baseline. DP_MAX_LINK_RATE = 0x001. RBR/HBR defined since DP 1.0; HBR2 added in DP 1.2.

0x00002.name: MAX_LANE_COUNT
0x00002.evidence: drm_dp.h baseline. DP_MAX_LANE_COUNT = 0x002. TPS3_SUPPORTED bit added in 1.2.

0x00006.name: MAIN_LINK_CHANNEL_CODING
0x00006.evidence: drm_dp.h baseline. DP_MAIN_LINK_CHANNEL_CODING = 0x006. 128b/132b bit added in DP 2.0.

0x0000C.name: I2C_SPEED_CAP
0x0000C.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_I2C_SPEED_CAP = 0x00c [DPI]. DPI is DP Interop Guideline (1.1a era).

0x0000D.name: eDP_CONFIGURATION_CAP
0x0000D.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_EDP_CONFIGURATION_CAP = 0x00d. DPCD_DISPLAY_CONTROL_CAPABLE bit is eDP v1.2+.

0x0000E.name: TRAINING_AUX_RD_INTERVAL
0x0000E.evidence: drm_dp.h baseline. EXTENDED_RECEIVER_CAP_FIELD_PRESENT bit added in DP 1.3.

0x00010.name: SUPPORTED_LINK_RATES0[7:0]
0x00010.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_SUPPORTED_LINK_RATES = 0x010 [eDP 1.4]. Link Rate Table feature.

0x00023.name: AV_SYNC_DATA_BLOCK_AV_GRANULARITY
0x00023.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_AV_GRANULARITY = 0x023. Section header says AV_SYNC_DATA_BLOCK (1.2).

0x0002E.name: RECEIVER_ADVANCED_LINK_POWER_MANAGEMENT_CAPABILITIES
0x0002E.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_RECEIVER_ALPM_CAP = 0x02e [eDP 1.4]. ALPM introduced in eDP 1.4.

0x00030.name: RESERVED
0x00030.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_GUID = 0x030 [1.2]. GUID for MST topology.

0x00060.name: DSC_SUPPORT
0x00060.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_DSC_SUPPORT = 0x060 [DP 1.4]. DSC introduced in DP 1.4.

0x00061.name: DSC_ALGORITHM_REVISION
0x00061.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_DSC_REV = 0x061. Part of DSC block (DP 1.4).

0x00062.name: DSC_RC_BUFFER_BLOCK_SIZE
0x00062.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_DSC_RC_BUF_BLK_SIZE = 0x062. Part of DSC block (DP 1.4).

0x00063.name: DSC_RC_BUFFER_SIZE
0x00063.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_DSC_RC_BUF_SIZE = 0x063. Part of DSC block (DP 1.4).

0x00064.name: DSC_SLICE_CAPABILITIES_1
0x00064.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_DSC_SLICE_CAP_1 = 0x064. Part of DSC block (DP 1.4).

0x00065.name: DSC_LINE_BUFFER_BIT_DEPTH
0x00065.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_DSC_LINE_BUF_BIT_DEPTH = 0x065. Part of DSC block (DP 1.4).

0x00066.name: DSC_BLOCK_PREDICTION
0x00066.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_DSC_BLK_PREDICTION_SUPPORT = 0x066. Part of DSC block (DP 1.4).

0x00067.name: DSC_MAX_BITS_PER_PIXEL_LOW
0x00067.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_DSC_MAX_BITS_PER_PIXEL_LOW = 0x067 [eDP 1.4]. Part of DSC block.

0x00068.name: DSC_MAX_BITS_PER_PIXEL_HIGH
0x00068.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_DSC_MAX_BITS_PER_PIXEL_HI = 0x068 [eDP 1.4]. MAX_BPP_DELTA bits added in eDP 1.5 / DP 2.0.

0x00069.name: DSC_DECODER_COLOR_FORMAT_CAPABILITIES
0x00069.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_DSC_DEC_COLOR_FORMAT_CAP = 0x069. Part of DSC block (DP 1.4).

0x0006A.name: DSC_DECODER_COLOR_DEPTH_CAPABILITIES
0x0006A.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_DSC_DEC_COLOR_DEPTH_CAP = 0x06A. Part of DSC block (DP 1.4).

0x0006C.name: DSC_MAXIMUM_SLICE_WIDTH
0x0006C.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_DSC_MAX_SLICE_WIDTH = 0x06C. Part of DSC block (DP 1.4).

0x0006D.name: RESERVED
0x0006D.evidence: Part of DSC capability block (DP 1.4), reserved for future DSC extensions.

0x0006E.name: RESERVED
0x0006E.evidence: Part of DSC capability block (DP 1.4), reserved for future DSC extensions.

0x0006F.name: RESERVED
0x0006F.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_DSC_BITS_PER_PIXEL_INC = 0x06F. Part of DSC block (DP 1.4).

0x00070.name: PSR_SUPPORT
0x00070.evidence: VESA eDP 1.3 (Feb 2011) introduced PSR. drm_dp.h: DP_PSR_SUPPORT = 0x070. PSR2 bits added in eDP 1.4/1.4a.

0x00071.name: PSR_CAPABILITIES
0x00071.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_PSR_CAPS = 0x071. PSR capability bits. SU_Y_COORDINATE added in eDP 1.4a, SU_GRANULARITY in eDP 1.4b.

0x00072.name: PSR2_SU_X_GRANULARITY_H
0x00072.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_PSR2_SU_X_GRANULARITY = 0x072 [eDP 1.4b]. PSR2 selective update X granularity.

0x00073.name: PSR2_SU_X_GRANULARITY_L
0x00073.evidence: drm_dp.h: Part of PSR2 SU X Granularity [eDP 1.4b], low byte.

0x00075.name: RESERVED
0x00075.evidence: Adjacent to PSR2 SU granularity registers, reserved in eDP 1.4b PSR2 block.

0x00080.name: DOWNSTREAM_PORT_0_CAP_0
0x00080.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_DOWNSTREAM_PORT_0 = 0x80. Downstream port capability, baseline.

0x00088.name: RESERVED
0x00088.evidence: Reserved downstream port capability space, baseline.

0x00089.name: RESERVED
0x00089.evidence: Reserved downstream port capability space, baseline.

0x0008A.name: RESERVED
0x0008A.evidence: Reserved downstream port capability space, baseline.

0x0008B.name: RESERVED
0x0008B.evidence: Reserved downstream port capability space, baseline.

0x0008C.name: RESERVED
0x0008C.evidence: Reserved downstream port capability space, baseline.

0x0008D.name: RESERVED
0x0008D.evidence: Reserved downstream port capability space, baseline.

0x0008E.name: RESERVED
0x0008E.evidence: Reserved downstream port capability space, baseline.

0x0008F.name: RESERVED
0x0008F.evidence: Reserved downstream port capability space, baseline.

0x00090.name: FEC_CAPABILITY
0x00090.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_FEC_CAPABILITY = 0x090 [1.4]. FEC introduced in DP 1.4.

0x00091.name: RESERVED
0x00091.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_FEC_CAPABILITY_1 = 0x091 [2.0]. Reserved/extended in FEC block. Register space defined in DP 1.4.

0x00092.name: RESERVED
0x00092.evidence: Reserved in FEC capability block, space allocated in DP 1.4.

0x000B0.name: PANEL_REPLAY_CAPABILITY
0x000B0.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_PANEL_REPLAY_CAP = 0x0b0. Kernel patches confirm Panel Replay is DP 2.0. DP_PANEL_REPLAY_SUPPORT bit 0, DP_PANEL_REPLAY_SU_SUPPORT bit 1.

0x000B1.name: PANEL_REPLAY_CAPABILITY_2
0x000B1.evidence: Kernel patches: DP_PANEL_PANEL_REPLAY_CAPABILITY at 0xb1. Part of Panel Replay (DP 2.0).

0x000B2.name: SU_X_GRANULARITY[7:0]
0x000B2.evidence: Kernel patches: DP_PANEL_PANEL_REPLAY_X_GRANULARITY at 0xb2. Panel Replay SU granularity (DP 2.0).

0x000B3.name: SU_X_GRANULARITY[15:8]
0x000B3.evidence: Panel Replay SU X granularity high byte (DP 2.0).

0x000B4.name: SU_Y_GRANULARITY
0x000B4.evidence: Kernel patches: DP_PANEL_PANEL_REPLAY_Y_GRANULARITY at 0xb4. Panel Replay SU Y granularity (DP 2.0).

0x00100.name: LINK_BW_SET
0x00100.evidence: drm_dp.h baseline. DP_LINK_BW_SET = 0x100. BW_5_4 added in 1.2, BW_8_1 in 1.4.

0x00102.name: TRAINING_PATTERN_SET
0x00102.evidence: drm_dp.h baseline. DP_TRAINING_PATTERN_SET = 0x102. PATTERN_3 added in 1.2.

0x0010C.name: LINK_QUAL_LANE1_SET
0x0010C.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_LINK_QUAL_LANE1_SET = 0x10c. Part of link quality set (1.2).

0x0010D.name: LINK_QUAL_LANE2_SET
0x0010D.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_LINK_QUAL_LANE2_SET = 0x10d. Part of link quality set (1.2).

0x0010E.name: LINK_QUAL_LANE3_SET
0x0010E.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_LINK_QUAL_LANE3_SET = 0x10e. Part of link quality set (1.2).

0x00115.name: LINK_RATE_SET
0x00115.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_LINK_RATE_SET = 0x115 [eDP 1.4]. Used with Link Rate Table.

0x00170.name: PSR_ENABLE_AND_CONFIGURATION
0x00170.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_PSR_EN_CFG = 0x170. PSR enable/config, introduced with PSR in eDP 1.3. PSR2 bits added in eDP 1.4a.

0x001B0.name: PANEL_REPLAY_CONFIGURATION
0x001B0.evidence: Panel Replay configuration register, introduced in DP 2.0 alongside Panel Replay capability.

0x00310.name: intel_adaptive_sync
0x00310.evidence: Intel Adaptive Sync proprietary DPCD register. Not in VESA standard.

0x00311.name: intel_adaptive_sync
0x00311.evidence: Intel Adaptive Sync proprietary DPCD register.

0x00312.name: intel_adaptive_sync
0x00312.evidence: Intel Adaptive Sync proprietary DPCD register.

0x00313.name: intel_adaptive_sync
0x00313.evidence: Intel Adaptive Sync proprietary DPCD register.

0x00314.name: DPCD_00314
0x00314.evidence: Intel proprietary register in source OUI extension space.

0x00316.name: DPCD_00316
0x00316.evidence: Intel proprietary register in source OUI extension space.

0x00320.name: dp_dpcd_00320
0x00320.evidence: MBO (Multi Beam Operation) custom register. Not in VESA standard.

0x00330.name: ALPM Sink Device Power Management State
0x00330.evidence: ALPM introduced in eDP 1.4. Power management state register for ALPM sink.

0x00340.name: INTEL_EDPHDR_CAPS_0
0x00340.evidence: Intel eDP HDR TCON capability register 0. Intel kernel patches confirm proprietary.

0x00341.name: DPCD_INTEL_EDPHDR_CAPS
0x00341.evidence: Intel eDP HDR TCON capability: PQ 2084, BT.2020, tone mapping, segmented backlight, nits brightness.

0x00342.name: TCON_CAPABILITY
0x00342.evidence: Intel eDP HDR TCON capability register 2.

0x00343.name: INTEL_EDPHDR_CAPS_3
0x00343.evidence: Intel eDP HDR TCON capability register 3.

0x00344.name: DPCD_00344
0x00344.evidence: Intel proprietary register in eDP HDR space.

0x00346.name: CONTENT_LUMINANCE
0x00346.evidence: Intel HDR content luminance byte 0. Proprietary.

0x00347.name: CONTENT_LUMINANCE
0x00347.evidence: Intel HDR content luminance byte 1. Proprietary.

0x00348.evidence: Intel HDR content luminance byte 2. Proprietary.

0x00349.name: CONTENT_LUMINANCE
0x00349.evidence: Intel HDR content luminance byte 3. Proprietary.

0x0034A.evidence: Intel panel EDID luminance override. Proprietary.

0x0034B.evidence: Intel panel EDID luminance override. Proprietary.

0x00350.name: PANEL_EDID_LUMINANCE_OVERRIDE
0x00350.evidence: Intel panel EDID luminance override. Proprietary.

0x00351.name: PANEL_EDID_LUMINANCE_OVERRIDE
0x00351.evidence: Intel panel EDID luminance override. Proprietary.

0x00354.name: NITS_BRIGHTNESS_CONTROL
0x00354.evidence: Intel nits brightness control (source OUI space). Proprietary.

0x00355.name: NITS_BRIGHTNESS_CONTROL
0x00355.evidence: Intel nits brightness control (source OUI space). Proprietary.

0x00356.name: NITS_BRIGHTNESS_CONTROL
0x00356.evidence: Intel nits brightness control (source OUI space). Proprietary.

0x00357.name: SMOOTH_BRIGHTNESS_CONTROL
0x00357.evidence: Intel smooth brightness control (source OUI space). Proprietary.

0x00358.name: DPCD_00358
0x00358.evidence: Intel proprietary register in source OUI extension space.

0x00370.name: DPCD_00370
0x00370.evidence: PSR2 related register in source-specific area. PSR2 with Y coordinate was eDP 1.4a.

0x00373.name: SinkPsrActiveVTotalInUse
0x00373.evidence: PSR2 active VTotal reporting. PSR2 extensions in eDP 1.4a.

0x00374.name: SinkPsrActiveVTotalInUse
0x00374.evidence: PSR2 active VTotal reporting high byte. eDP 1.4a.

0x00379.name: Pixel Deviation Per Line
0x00379.evidence: PSR2 selective update pixel deviation. eDP 1.4a.

0x0037A.name: Max Number Of Deviation Line
0x0037A.evidence: PSR2 selective update max deviation lines. eDP 1.4a.

0x003F0.name: Early Scanline SDP for PSR2
0x003F0.evidence: Early Transport for PSR2 was introduced in eDP 1.5. Early Scanline SDP configuration.

0x0040F.name: Specific Tcon setting for AMD
0x0040F.evidence: AMD proprietary TCON setting register. Not in VESA standard.

0x00410.name: AMD AUPI: panel Manufacture ID
0x00410.evidence: AMD AUPI (AMD Unique Panel Identifier) proprietary register.

0x00416.name: AMD AUPI: Tcon FW Device ID

0x00417.name: AMD AUPI: Tcon FW Device ID

0x00700.name: EDP_DPCD_REV
0x00700.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_EDP_DPCD_REV = 0x700 [eDP 1.2]. eDP DPCD space introduced in eDP 1.2.

0x00701.name: EDP_GENERAL_CAPABILITY_1
0x00701.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_EDP_GENERAL_CAP_1 = 0x701. Part of eDP 1.2 capability block.

0x00703.name: EDP_GENERAL_CAPABILITY_2
0x00703.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_EDP_GENERAL_CAP_2 = 0x703. Part of eDP 1.2 capability block.

0x00705.name: EDP_SEGMENTED_BACKLIGHT_CAP
0x00705.evidence: Segmented backlight capability. Regional/segmented backlight was introduced in eDP 1.4.

0x00721.name: EDP_BACKLIGHT_MODE_SET
0x00721.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_EDP_BACKLIGHT_MODE_SET_REGISTER = 0x721. eDP 1.2 backlight mode. UPDATE_REGION_BRIGHTNESS bit added in eDP 1.4.

0x00730.name: DPCD_00730
0x00730.evidence: Segmented/smooth backlight control enable. Regional backlight was eDP 1.4.

0x00731.name: DPCD_00731
0x00731.evidence: Segmented backlight control register. Regional backlight was eDP 1.4.

0x00732.name: EDP_DBC_MINIMUM_BRIGHTNESS_SET
0x00732.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_EDP_DBC_MINIMUM_BRIGHTNESS_SET = 0x732. No version annotation = baseline eDP.

0x00733.name: EDP_DBC_MAXIMUM_BRIGHTNESS_SET
0x00733.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_EDP_DBC_MAXIMUM_BRIGHTNESS_SET = 0x733. No version annotation = baseline eDP.

0x00734.name: NITS_BRIGHTNESS_CONTROL
0x00734.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_EDP_PANEL_TARGET_LUMINANCE_VALUE = 0x734. Panel luminance was eDP 1.4 feature.

0x00735.name: NITS_BRIGHTNESS_CONTROL
0x00735.evidence: Nits brightness control byte 1. Panel luminance was eDP 1.4.

0x00736.name: NITS_BRIGHTNESS_CONTROL
0x00736.evidence: Nits brightness control byte 2. Panel luminance was eDP 1.4.

0x00737.name: SMOOTH_BRIGHTNESS_CONTROL
0x00737.evidence: Smooth brightness control transition time. Advanced backlight feature from eDP 1.4 era.

0x00738.name: SMOOTH_BRIGHTNESS_CONTROL
0x00738.evidence: Smooth brightness control transition time byte 1.

0x00739.name: SMOOTH_BRIGHTNESS_CONTROL
0x00739.evidence: Smooth brightness control current value byte 0.

0x0073A.name: SMOOTH_BRIGHTNESS_CONTROL
0x0073A.evidence: Smooth brightness control current value byte 1.

0x0073B.name: SMOOTH_BRIGHTNESS_CONTROL
0x0073B.evidence: Smooth brightness control current value byte 2.

0x00DEF.name: HDR_2084/2020_CAPABILITY
0x00DEF.evidence: Non-standard DPCD address (not in standard spec range). VESA HDR mapping but at non-standard location.

0x00FEA.name: HDR_2084/2020_CAPABILITY
0x00FEA.evidence: Non-standard DPCD address (alternate HDR capability). Not in standard DPCD map.

0x02002.name: SINK_COUNT_ESI
0x02002.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_SINK_COUNT_ESI = 0x2002. ESI area introduced in DP 1.2 for MST.

0x02006.name: PSR_ERROR_STATUS
0x02006.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_PSR_ERROR_STATUS = 0x2006. PSR was introduced in eDP 1.3. VSC_SDP_UNCORRECTABLE_ERROR bit added in eDP 1.4.

0x02200.name: DPCD_REV_EXTENDED
0x02200.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_DP13_DPCD_REV = 0x2200. Extended Receiver Capability introduced in DP 1.3.

0x02201.name: MAX_LINK_RATE_EXTENDED
0x02201.evidence: Extended max link rate. Part of Extended Receiver Capability (DP 1.3). Reports HBR3 (8.1 Gbps).

0x02202.name: DPCD_02202
0x02202.evidence: Extended max lane count. Mirror of 00002h in Extended Receiver Capability (DP 1.3).

0x02203.name: DPCD_02203
0x02203.evidence: Extended downspread/training mode. Mirror of 00003h in Extended Receiver Capability (DP 1.3).

0x02207.name: DPCD_02207
0x02207.evidence: Extended downstream port info. Mirror of 00007h in Extended Receiver Capability (DP 1.3).

0x02208.name: DPCD_02208
0x02208.evidence: Extended receiver port 0 cap. Mirror of 00008h in Extended Receiver Capability (DP 1.3).

0x02209.name: BUFFER_SIZE_0
0x02209.evidence: Extended receiver port 0 buffer size. Part of Extended Receiver Capability (DP 1.3).

0x0220A.name: DPCD_0220A
0x0220A.evidence: Extended receiver port 1 cap. Mirror of 0000Ah in Extended Receiver Capability (DP 1.3).

0x0220B.name: BUFFER_SIZE_1
0x0220B.evidence: Extended receiver port 1 buffer size. Part of Extended Receiver Capability (DP 1.3).

0x0220D.name: DPCD_0220D
0x0220D.evidence: Extended eDP configuration cap. Mirror of 0000Dh in Extended Receiver Capability (DP 1.3).

0x0220E.name: DPCD_0220E
0x0220E.evidence: Extended training AUX RD interval. Mirror of 0000Eh in Extended Receiver Capability (DP 1.3).

0x0220F.name: DPCD_0220F
0x0220F.evidence: Extended adapter cap. Mirror of 0000Fh in Extended Receiver Capability (DP 1.3).

0x02210.name: DPRX_FEATURE_ENUMERATION_LIST
0x02210.evidence: drm_dp.h: DP_DPRX_FEATURE_ENUMERATION_LIST = 0x2210 [DP 1.3]. SST_SPLIT_SDP/VSC_EXT bits added in DP 1.4.

0x02214.name: DPCD_02214
0x02214.evidence: DPCD_DB description: Adaptive Sync SDP support, eDP v1.5 新增. drm_dp.h: DP_DPRX_FEATURE_ENUMERATION_LIST_CONT_1 = 0x2214 [2.0 E11].

0xF0000.name: VENDOR_SPECIFIC_FIELD_START
0xF0000.evidence: Vendor-specific DPCD space (F0000h-FFFFFh) defined since DP 1.0. LTTPR usage added in DP 1.3.
